case_title: EMILE LACAMPAGNE VS. DIEU THI HUYNH DBA ANDY NAIL SPA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. (FILED, INCORRECTLY, ON SC-150 FORM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LACAMPAGNE, EMILE
TRIAL RESET TO APR-23-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-19-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DIEU THI HUYNH DBA ANDY NAIL SPA
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT DIEU THI HUYNH DBA ANDY NAIL SPA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-23-2019. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER MINHTAM HA #300522 AND WITNESS SANDY GIANG. DEFENDANT ALSO PRESENT IN COURT. PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT DIEU THI HUYNH DBA ANDY NAIL SPA
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $481.58 RE 35916 FOR TRANSACTION W0419506D002 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO EMILE LACAMPAGNE, DOC #1909959666, WARRANT #38205953, DATED JUL-19-2019
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
